scripts.build:widget: bun run scripts/gen-types.ts && bun run scripts/build-widget.ts
scripts.qml:lint: podman run --rm -v $PWD:/work:ro -w /work localhost/totvibe-qml:qt6 sh -c 'qmllint -W 0 package/contents/ui/*.qml tests/qml/*.qml'
scripts.qml:format: podman run --rm -v $PWD:/work:ro -w /work localhost/totvibe-qml:qt6 sh -c 'for f in package/contents/ui/*.qml tests/qml/*.qml; do qmlformat "$f" | diff -q "$f" - || exit 1; done'
scripts.qml:format:fix: podman run --rm -v $PWD:/work -w /work localhost/totvibe-qml:qt6 sh -c 'qmlformat -i package/contents/ui/*.qml tests/qml/*.qml'
